free_text: - Target-thickness: A target placed downstream of the
beam pick up detector was constituted of a 5.0
cm*5.0 cm*1.5 cm graphite block with natural
isotopic composition and density of 1.78 g/cm**3.
The effective thickness of the target was 2.12 cm
